case_title: SHUAI ZHOU VS. SHABU PUB, INC.

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SHABU PUB, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHOU, SHUAI AS TO DEFENDANT SHABU PUB, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
